examples.title: Recursive Fibonacci
examples.code:
def fib(n):
    return n if n <=1 else fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)
examples.explanation: Each call branches into two until base cases (n=0/1)

examples.title: Tail Recursive Factorial
examples.code:
FUNCTION fact(n, acc=1):
    IF n == 0 RETURN acc
    ELSE RETURN fact(n-1, acc*n)
examples.explanation: Accumulator stores intermediate results for stack reuse
